title: format_receipt_timestamp: old dates omit year (ambiguous for multi-year chats)
description: Dates older than 6 days format as 'Apr 12' with no year. In a chat history spanning years, 'Apr 12' is ambiguous — is it this year or last year? Users will file issues. The spec says 'Display relative or hour-granularity strings' but doesn't say omit year. Fix: include year for dates older than ~365 days, e.g., 'Apr 12 2023'. This is a design decision to make before the API fossilizes.
close_reason: implemented; ofy.6 is a decision record no action needed
